SELECT 
WSORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME,
WSORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
WSORCTL.LINE_TYPE ,
WATLPTI.PREV_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ,
EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID,
EORCTLOL.DV_ORDER_LINE_ID  /* CF LSS CR */
FROM $$STGDB.WI_ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN WSORCTL
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_AR_TRX_LINE_PREV_TRX_ID  WATLPTI 
	ON	(WSORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID   = WATLPTI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
	AND	WSORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME    = WATLPTI.GLOBAL_NAME) 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLOL
	ON ( EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WSORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
	AND EORCTLOL.GLOBAL_NAME = WSORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME )
WHERE WSORCTL.LINE_TYPE = 'TAX'

SELECT 
STRXL.GLOBAL_NAME,
STRXL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, 
CASE WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='INV' THEN -9999 
ELSE
 COALESCE(CAST(
  CASE
   WHEN ( UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) = 'ICMS-ADJ' OR COALESCE(STRXL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT,ETRX.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT) = 'ICMS-ADJ' ) THEN
   CASE WHEN STRXL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12 between 0 and 999 THEN -9999 ELSE
    CASE WHEN ETRX.INTERFACE_HEADER_ATTRIBUTE10  IN ('SPECIAL_DEBIT','SPECIAL_CREDIT','SPECIAL_INVOICE') THEN -9999 ELSE
    STRXL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12
    END
   END
   /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q2FY15*/
   WHEN COALESCE(STRXL.interface_line_context,ETRX.interface_header_context) in ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS' ,'SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT')
  
    THEN (CASE WHEN STRXL.interface_line_attribute12 between 0 and 999 THEN -9999 
      ELSE STRXL.interface_line_attribute12 
      END)
   WHEN COALESCE(STRXL.interface_line_context,ETRX.interface_header_context)='TAX-CREDITS' THEN 
    STRXL.interface_line_attribute12
   WHEN COALESCE(STRXL.interface_line_context,ETRX.interface_header_context)='ORDER ENTRY' THEN
    CASE
     WHEN  STRXL.interface_line_attribute14='CB Service Invoice' THEN STRXL.interface_line_attribute15
     WHEN  STRXL.interface_line_attribute14='CB Product Credit Memo' THEN STRXL.global_attribute7
    ELSE  STRXL.attribute15
    END
  ELSE NULL
  END AS DECIMAL(15,0)),-9999) 
END PREV_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN STRXL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
 ON (STRXL.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX ETRX
  ON(STRXL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = ETRX.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
  AND STRXL.GLOBAL_NAME = ETRX.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
 ON( SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT=STRXL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
  AND SAT.SS_CODE=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
 ON(SAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
 ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY   
INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT  
 ON (      NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
        AND  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
     AND   NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
      
  )
WHERE STRXL.LINE_TYPE IN ('LINE','FREIGHT')
UNION ALL
SELECT WSTRXL.GLOBAL_NAME,
WSTRXL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, 
COALESCE(CASE 
WHEN WSTRXL.LINE_TYPE='TAX' AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE<>'INV' THEN  WSTRXL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
ELSE  -9999 END, -9999) PREV_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN WSTRXL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
 ON (WSTRXL.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
 ON( SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = WSTRXL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
 AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
 ON ( SAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT  
 ON (  NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
 AND  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
 AND   NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
  
 )
WHERE WSTRXL.LINE_TYPE = 'TAX'

SELECT
 SORCTL_OUT.GLOBAL_NAME
,SORCTL_OUT.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
,SORCTL_OUT.LINE_TYPE
,SORCTL_OUT.PREV_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID as PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
/* Q2FY15 LSS : Nullify FREIGHT Order_Line_ID */
,CASE WHEN NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID LIKE 'WEE%FEE%' OR NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID = 'FREIGHT' THEN 0
 WHEN NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID LIKE 'WEE%FEE%' OR NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID = 'FREIGHT' THEN 0
 ELSE SORCTL_OUT.ORDER_LINE_ID END as ORDER_LINE_ID /* CF LSS CR */
,SORCTL_OUT.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
,SORCTL_OUT.ATTRIBUTE8
,SORCTL_OUT.ORDER_LINE_ID as DV_ORDER_LINE_ID /* CF LSS CR */
FROM
(      
  SELECT SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME,
   SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
   SORCTL.LINE_TYPE ,
   WATLPTI.PREV_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID      ,
   CASE 
   WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN
     CASE WHEN COALESCE(LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER,'UNKNOWN') LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' 
	 OR SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT LIKE 'OM-FBINV%'
	 THEN --TRIM(SUBSTR(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 ,1,  POSITION('-' IN SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4)-1))
	 CASE WHEN Position('-' IN SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4)>0 THEN 
			Trim(Substr(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 ,1,  Position('-' IN SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4)-1))	
			ELSE SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 END 
	 WHEN COALESCE(SORCTL.interface_line_context,EORCT.interface_header_context) In ('METRIX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ORDER ENTRY','ICMS-ADJ') 
   THEN 
    /* OA Q3FY14 */
  CASE WHEN  SORCTL.LINE_TYPE = 'LINE' AND
      (UPPER(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9) like '%TOP SKU%' AND UPPER(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY) = 'OFFER ATTRIBUTION' ) 
      THEN SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6   
   WHEN SORCTL.LINE_TYPE = 'LINE' AND (SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9  IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY) = 'OFFER ATTRIBUTION' ) 
    THEN SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9
  ELSE SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6    
     END 
     ELSE NULL
     END 
    WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE  In ('CM','DM') THEN 
   CASE WHEN COALESCE(LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER,'UNKNOWN') LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' 
   OR SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT LIKE 'OM-FBINV%'
   THEN --TRIM(SUBSTR(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 ,1,  POSITION('-' IN SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4)-1))
   CASE WHEN Position('-' IN SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4)>0 THEN 
			Trim(Substr(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 ,1,  Position('-' IN SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4)-1))	
			ELSE SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 END 
   WHEN COALESCE(SORCTL.interface_line_context,EORCT.interface_header_context) In ('METRIX','ORDER ENTRY','SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ') 
    THEN CASE WHEN ((COALESCE(SORCTL.interface_line_context,EORCT.interface_header_context) = 'METRIX' 
        Or COALESCE(SORCTL.interface_line_context,EORCT.interface_header_context) = 'ORDER ENTRY'       
        AND ( CASE  WHEN SORCTL.interface_line_attribute2 Like '%RMA%' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ) = 'Y' )
		OR (COALESCE(SORCTL.interface_line_context,EORCT.interface_header_context) In ('ICMS-ADJ')))
       THEN 
      /* OA Q3FY14 */
       CASE WHEN SORCTL.LINE_TYPE = 'LINE' AND (UPPER(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9)  like  '%TOP SKU%' AND UPPER(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY) = 'OFFER ATTRIBUTION' ) 
         THEN SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6   
        WHEN SORCTL.LINE_TYPE = 'LINE' AND (SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9  IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY) = 'OFFER ATTRIBUTION' ) 
         THEN SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9
       ELSE SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6     
       end
     ELSE 
	 
      
    /* OA Q3FY14 */
      CASE WHEN (UPPER(EORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9 ) like '%TOP SKU%' AND UPPER(EORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY) = 'OFFER ATTRIBUTION' ) 
       THEN EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6   
	  WHEN (EORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9 IS NOT NULL AND UPPER(EORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY) = 'OFFER ATTRIBUTION' ) THEN EORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9
      ELSE EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6   
      END
     END
   ELSE 0
   END 
   ELSE NULL
   END ORDER_LINE_ID ,
   CASE WHEN SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution' AND SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9 LIKE '%Top SKU%' THEN NULL  /* OA Q4FY14 */
    WHEN (SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY <>  'Offer Attribution' or SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY is null )THEN NULL
   ELSE SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6 END AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, 
   CASE WHEN SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution' AND SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9 NOT LIKE '%Top SKU%' THEN SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE8  
   ELSE NULL END as ATTRIBUTE8, /* OA Q4FY14 */  
   SORCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID /* CF LSS CR */
   FROM
   $$STGDB.WI_ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN SORCTL 
   INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
    ON ( SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME ) 
   INNER JOIN  $$ETLONLYDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX EORCT  
    ON ( SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = EORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID  
    AND SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME = EORCT.GLOBAL_NAME) 
   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT 
    ON( SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT= SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
     AND SAT.SS_CODE=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
   INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT 
    ON(SAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY) 
   INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT   
    ON (      NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
            AND  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
        AND   NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE 
        /* AND   NATT.SS_CODE = NAT.SS_CODE  : commented by rchettri : LSS-Q2FY14  */ 
     ) 
   INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_AR_TRX_LINE_PREV_TRX_ID  WATLPTI 
    ON (SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID   = WATLPTI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
    AND SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME    = WATLPTI.GLOBAL_NAME) 
   LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES  EORCTL  
    ON ( EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  =  WATLPTI.PREV_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  
    AND EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME     =  WATLPTI.GLOBAL_NAME)
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$GGSRCVWDB.XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN LINE_EXTN
   ON (LINE_EXTN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID	
      AND SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )
   WHERE SORCTL.LINE_TYPE IN ('LINE','FREIGHT')
) SORCTL_OUT
/* CF LSS CR */
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON(NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = SORCTL_OUT.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
       AND       SORCTL_OUT.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
                                                  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B ELMTL    /* added for Q4FY18 CDC */
   ON (  SORCTL_OUT.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = ELMTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
   and   SORCTL_OUT.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC')
                
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP2
       ON (NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID = ELMTL.SEGMENT1 
       AND            SORCTL_OUT.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC')

SELECT
 SORCTL.BATCH_ID                      
 ,SORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME                   
 ,SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE11    
 ,SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12    
 ,SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE14    
 ,SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15    
 ,SORCTL.ORG_ID                        
 ,SORCTL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7             
 ,SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID          
 ,SORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID               
 ,SORCTL.REASON_CODE                   
 ,SORCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             
 ,SORCTL.QUANTITY_CREDITED             
 ,SORCTL.QUANTITY_INVOICED             
 ,SORCTL.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE           
 ,SORCTL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE            
 ,SORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID            
 ,SORCTL.LINE_TYPE                     
 ,SORCTL.RULE_START_DATE               
 ,SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT        
 ,SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE1     
 ,SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2     
 ,SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6     
 ,SORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT               
 ,SORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID      
 ,SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE15                   
 ,SORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION      
 ,SORCTL.AMOUNT_INCLUDES_TAX_FLAG      
 ,SORCTL.CREATED_BY                    
 ,SORCTL.DESCRIPTION                   
 ,SORCTL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY     
 ,SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE10    
 ,SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE13    
 ,SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE3     
 ,SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4     
 ,CAST(TRIM(CASE WHEN 
 SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT in ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS' , 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX' ,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT')
   
 /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q2FY15*/
 THEN  (CASE WHEN ((CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%04%'
 OR (CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%02%'
 AND (CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) NOT LIKE '%2E%'
 AND CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) NOT LIKE '%2D%'))
 OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%05%'
 OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%06%'
 OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%07%'
 OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%3A%'
 OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%3B%'
 OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%3C%'
 OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%3D%'
 OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%3E%'
 OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) NOT LIKE '%03%'
 OR CHAR_LENGTH(TRIM(SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8))=0
 OR SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 is NULL
 OR SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 = 0 ))
 THEN -9999
 ELSE SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8
 END) 
 ELSE -9999 
 END) AS INTEGER ) AS INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 
 ,SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9     
 ,SORCTL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
 ,SORCTL.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
 ,SORCTL.LINE_NUMBER                   
 ,SORCTL.PAYMENT_SET_ID                
 ,SORCTL.QUANTITY_ORDERED              
 ,SORCTL.TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG               
 ,SORCTL.TAX_PRECEDENCE                
 ,SORCTL.TAX_RATE                      
 ,SORCTL.TAXABLE_AMOUNT                
 ,SORCTL.UOM_CODE                      
 ,SORCTL.WAREHOUSE_ID                  
 ,SORCTL.CREATION_DATE                 
 ,SORCTL.GES_UPDATE_DATE               
 ,SORCTL.CREATE_DATETIME               
 ,SORCTL.ACTION_CODE
 ,SORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE7     
 ,SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE3                    
 ,SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE4                    
 ,SORCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID      
 ,SORCTL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
 ,SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE11 
 /* OA Q3FY14 */ 
 ,SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9
 ,SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
 ,SORCTL.ATTRIBUTE8
 FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES SORCTL
 UNION ALL
 SELECT
 EORCTL.BATCH_ID                      
 ,EORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME                   
 ,EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE11    
 ,EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12    
 ,EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE14    
 ,EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE15    
 ,EORCTL.ORG_ID                        
 ,EORCTL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7             
 ,EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID          
 ,EORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID               
 ,EORCTL.REASON_CODE                   
 ,EORCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             
 ,EORCTL.QUANTITY_CREDITED             
 ,EORCTL.QUANTITY_INVOICED             
 ,EORCTL.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE           
 ,EORCTL.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE            
 ,EORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID            
 ,EORCTL.LINE_TYPE                     
 ,EORCTL.RULE_START_DATE               
 ,EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT        
 ,EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE1     
 ,EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2     
 ,EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6     
 ,EORCTL.EXTENDED_AMOUNT               
 ,EORCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID      
 ,EORCTL.ATTRIBUTE15                   
 ,EORCTL.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION      
 ,EORCTL.AMOUNT_INCLUDES_TAX_FLAG      
 ,EORCTL.CREATED_BY                    
 ,EORCTL.DESCRIPTION                   
 ,EORCTL.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY     
 ,EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE10    
 ,EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE13    
 ,EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE3     
 ,EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 
 ,CAST(TRIM(CASE WHEN 
 EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT in ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS' , 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM','AR-TRXN-EXT','ICMS-AR-TRXN-EXT')
 
 /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q2FY15*/
 THEN  (CASE WHEN ((CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%04%'
 OR (CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%02%'
 AND (CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) NOT LIKE '%2E%'
 AND CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) NOT LIKE '%2D%'))
 OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%05%'
 OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%06%'
 OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%07%'
 OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%3A%'
 OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%3B%'
 OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%3C%'
 OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%3D%'
 OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) LIKE '%3E%'
 OR CHAR2HEXINT(TRANSLATE(EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 USING LATIN_TO_UNICODE)) NOT LIKE '%03%'
 OR CHAR_LENGTH(TRIM(EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8))=0
 OR EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 is NULL
 OR EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8 = 0 ))
 THEN -9999
 ELSE EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8
 END) 
 ELSE -9999 
 END) AS INTEGER ) AS INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8     
 ,EORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9     
 ,EORCTL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
 ,EORCTL.LAST_UPDATED_BY               
 ,EORCTL.LINE_NUMBER                   
 ,EORCTL.PAYMENT_SET_ID                
 ,EORCTL.QUANTITY_ORDERED              
 ,EORCTL.TAX_EXEMPT_FLAG               
 ,EORCTL.TAX_PRECEDENCE                
 ,EORCTL.TAX_RATE                      
 ,EORCTL.TAXABLE_AMOUNT                
 ,EORCTL.UOM_CODE                      
 ,EORCTL.WAREHOUSE_ID

/*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q2FY15 prmaddal: Added PP-XAAS as part of Q2FY17 SOT OA*/
  THEN (CASE WHEN STRXL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12 between 0 and 999 THEN -9999 ELSE STRXL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12 END)
    
  WHEN COALESCE(STRXL.interface_line_context,ETRX.interface_header_context)='TAX-CREDITS' THEN STRXL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12

  WHEN ((COALESCE(STRXL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT ,ETRX.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT)  = 'ORDER ENTRY' 
  OR (COALESCE(STRXL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT ,ETRX.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT) = 'ORDER ENTRY TNC' AND INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 = 'ORDER ENTRY')   /*Added AND : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ ) 
    OR (UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) LIKE 'ORDER MANAGEMENT%' AND INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 NOT LIKE 'XAAS'))
   THEN
    CASE  WHEN  STRXL.interface_line_attribute14='CB Service Invoice'  THEN STRXL.interface_line_attribute15
     
      WHEN  STRXL.interface_line_attribute14='CB Product Credit Memo' THEN STRXL.global_attribute7
      ELSE  /*COALESCE(STRXL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,STRXL.ATTRIBUTE6)*/
        /* FEB Q3fy15  LSS-OM  UKH/AUS change : ON-ACCOUNT CREDIT MEMO CHANGE : Attribute15 will have referece to org. invoice line */
        /*STRXL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID */
        COALESCE(STRXL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, STRXL.ATTRIBUTE15)
    END
 /*
 WHEN UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) = 'SERVICE RMA' THEN COALESCE(STRXL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,STRXL.ATTRIBUTE6)
 */
  
  WHEN UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) IN ('T4C SALES ADJ' , 'T4C - SERVICE CM') THEN STRXL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12
  
  WHEN ( UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) IN ('DISPUTE')  OR COALESCE(STRXL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT,ETRX.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT) IN ('DISPUTE'))
/* RCHETTRI : Applied trx for DISPUTE will have it in  PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID. On Account DISPUTE will have in ATTRIBUTE12 */   
  /*THEN COALESCE(STRXL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,STRXL.ATTRIBUTE12 )*/ /* amkumar2: commented as per ERP changes */
   THEN COALESCE(STRXL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,STRXL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12)
    
  ELSE NULL
 END AS DECIMAL(15,0)),-9999) 
 END PREV_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_ST_CG_RA_CUST_TRX_LN STRXL
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON (STRXL.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX ETRX
   ON(STRXL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = ETRX.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
   AND STRXL.GLOBAL_NAME = ETRX.GLOBAL_NAME)
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
  ON( SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT=STRXL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
   AND SAT.SS_CODE=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
  ON(SAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
 ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY  
 INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT  
  ON (      NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
         AND  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
      AND   NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE)
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
( SELECT EL.BK_PRODUCT_ID, NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CHINA_MISC_PROD_LIST EL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON (NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID = EL.BK_PRODUCT_ID)
) MISC 
ON (STRXL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = MISC.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT) /* added for Q2FY17, CE-CHINA change */
WHERE STRXL.LINE_TYPE IN ('LINE','FREIGHT')
 
 
 UNION ALL
 SELECT WSTRXL.GLOBAL_NAME,
 WSTRXL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, 
 CAST(COALESCE(
 CASE WHEN MISC.BK_PRODUCT_ID LIKE 'MISC%' AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE='CM' AND WSTRXL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12 between 0 and 999 THEN -9999  /* added for Q2FY17, CE-CHINA change */
      WHEN WSTRXL.LINE_TYPE='TAX' AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE<>'INV' 
   THEN  CASE WHEN UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) IN ( 'T4C SALES ADJ', 'T4C - SERVICE CM' ) THEN WSTRXL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12
      
      WHEN ( UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) = 'ICMS-ADJ' OR COALESCE(WSTRXL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT,'UNKNOWN') = 'ICMS-ADJ'
OR (UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) = 'ICMS-ADJ'  AND INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 NOT IN 'XAAS')) THEN
       CASE  WHEN WSTRXL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12 between 0 and 999 THEN -9999 
         ELSE
          CASE WHEN WSTRXL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE10  IN ('SPECIAL_DEBIT','SPECIAL_CREDIT','SPECIAL_INVOICE') THEN -9999 
            ELSE WSTRXL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12
          END
       END
       
      WHEN ( UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) = 'SERVICE RMA' OR COALESCE(WSTRXL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT,'UNKNOWN') = 'SERVICE RMA' ) 
        /* LSS-CF Q2FY15: INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12 will have orig_cust_trx_line information. 
                             THEN WSTRXL.ATTRIBUTE6 */
                                THEN WSTRXL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12
       
      WHEN UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) IN ('DISPUTE')
     /* RCHETTRI : Applied trx for DISPUTE will have it in  PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID. On Account DISPUTE will have in ATTRIBUTE12 */   
       /*THEN COALESCE( WSTRXL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,  WSTRXL.ATTRIBUTE12 )*/ /* amkumar2: ERP changes*/
       THEN COALESCE( WSTRXL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,  WSTRXL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE12)
      
      /* FEB Q3fy15  LSS-OM  UKH/AUS change : ON-ACCOUNT CREDIT MEMO CHANGE : Attribute15 will have referece to org. invoice line */
      WHEN (UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) LIKE 'ORDER MANAGEMENT%' AND  INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 NOT LIKE'%XAAS%')
       THEN COALESCE(WSTRXL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, WSTRXL.ATTRIBUTE15)
      
      ELSE WSTRXL.PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
     END
  ELSE  -9999 
  END, -9999)AS DECIMAL(15,0)) PREV_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
 FROM 
 $$STGDB.WI_ST_CG_RA_CUST_TRX_LN WSTRXL
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
  ON (WSTRXL.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME)
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
  ON( SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = WSTRXL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
  AND SAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
  ON ( SAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
 ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY   
 INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT  
  ON (  NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
  AND  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
  AND   NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
  /* AND   NATT.SS_CODE = NAT.SS_CODE : commented by rchettri : LSS-Q1  */ 
  )
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
( SELECT EL.BK_PRODUCT_ID, NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CHINA_MISC_PROD_LIST EL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON (NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID = EL.BK_PRODUCT_ID)
) MISC
ON (WSTRXL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = MISC.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT)  /* added for Q2FY17, CE-CHINA change */
WHERE WSTRXL.LINE_TYPE = 'TAX'

SELECT
 SCRCTL_OUT.GLOBAL_NAME
,SCRCTL_OUT.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
,SCRCTL_OUT.LINE_TYPE
,SCRCTL_OUT.PREV_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID as PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
/* Q2FY15 LSS : Nullify FREIGHT Order_Line_ID */
,CASE WHEN NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID LIKE 'WEE%FEE%' OR /*NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID = 'FREIGHT' */  ECMPL.BK_PRODUCT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 0 
 WHEN NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID LIKE 'WEE%FEE%' OR /*NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID = 'FREIGHT' */  ECMPL.BK_PRODUCT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 0 
ELSE SCRCTL_OUT.ORDER_LINE_ID END as ORDER_LINE_ID /* Q2FY17 CE-CHINA - Commenting 'FREIGHT' condition and adding BK_PRODUCT_ID from ETLONLYDB.EL_CHINA_MISC_PROD_LIST  */
--,SCRCTL_OUT.ORDER_LINE_ID as DV_ORDER_LINE_ID /* CF LSS CR */
 ,CASE 
 WHEN NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID LIKE 'WEE%FEE%' OR   ECMPL.BK_PRODUCT_ID IS NOT NULL 
 THEN 0 
 WHEN NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID LIKE 'WEE%FEE%' OR   ECMPL.BK_PRODUCT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 0
 ELSE 
 SCRCTL_OUT.ORDER_LINE_ID 
 END as DV_ORDER_LINE_ID 

FROM
(
SELECT SCRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME,
 SCRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
 SCRCTL.LINE_TYPE ,
 WATLPTI.PREV_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID      ,
CASE 
WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN
			CASE 
			WHEN ELON.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN ELON.ORDER_LINE_ID      
			WHEN COALESCE(LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER,'UNKNOWN') LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' 
			OR SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT LIKE 'OM-FBINV%'
			THEN --TRIM(SUBSTR(SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 ,1,  POSITION('-' IN SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4)-1))	
			CASE WHEN Position('-' IN SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4)>0 THEN 
			Trim(Substr(SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 ,1,  Position('-' IN SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4)-1))	
			ELSE SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 END 
			WHEN  (COALESCE(SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT ,EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT) = 'CBM-OPL-CLOUD') and INSTR(SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2,'-')=0 THEN SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2 /*Added  as part of CBM Mar 2020 Release*/
					WHEN  (COALESCE(SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT ,EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT) = 'ICMS-ADJ' AND EXT.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER = 'CBM-OPL-ICMS') THEN SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2 /*Added  as part of CBM Mar 2020 Release*/
					WHEN ( ((COALESCE(SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT ,EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT) In
			('METRIX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ORDER ENTRY','ICMS-ADJ') AND EXT.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER <> 'CBM-OPL-ICMS')
 OR (COALESCE(SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT ,EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT) = 'ORDER ENTRY TNC' AND INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 = 'ORDER ENTRY')   /*Added AND : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ ) 
							OR (UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) LIKE 'ORDER MANAGEMENT%' AND INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 NOT LIKE '%XAAS%' )
							OR (UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) LIKE 'ICMS-ADJ' AND INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 NOT LIKE 'XAAS'))
						THEN SCRCTL.interface_line_attribute6
					WHEN UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) = 'FSO METRIX' THEN SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE10	
					WHEN (UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) IN ('ICMS-ADJ') 
					OR (COALESCE(SCRCTL.interface_line_context,EORCT.interface_header_context) IN ('ICMS-ADJ') AND EXT.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER <> 'CBM-OPL-ICMS')
					OR (UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) LIKE 'ICMS-ADJ' AND INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 NOT LIKE 'XAAS'))
						THEN SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6 					
			ELSE NULL
			END 
		WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE  IN ('CM','DM') THEN 
			CASE 
			WHEN ELON.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN ELON.ORDER_LINE_ID      
			WHEN COALESCE(LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER,'UNKNOWN') LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' 
			OR SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT LIKE 'OM-FBINV%'
			THEN --TRIM(SUBSTR(SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 ,1,  POSITION('-' IN SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4)-1))
			CASE WHEN Position('-' IN SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4)>0 THEN 
			Trim(Substr(SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 ,1,  Position('-' IN SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4)-1))	
			ELSE SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 END 
			WHEN (COALESCE(SCRCTL.interface_line_context,EORCT.interface_header_context) 
			IN ('METRIX','ORDER ENTRY','SALES ADJUSTMENTS') 
			OR (COALESCE(SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT ,EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT) = 'ORDER ENTRY TNC' 
			AND INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 = 'ORDER ENTRY') 
			OR (UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) LIKE 'ORDER MANAGEMENT%' AND INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 NOT LIKE '%XAAS%')) THEN
					CASE WHEN COALESCE(SCRCTL.interface_line_context,EORCT.interface_header_context) = 'METRIX'
							OR ( (COALESCE(SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT ,EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT) ='ORDER ENTRY'
 OR (COALESCE(SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT ,EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT) = 'ORDER ENTRY TNC' AND INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 = 'ORDER ENTRY')   /*Added AND : TNC Feb 2020 Release*/ ) 
 OR (UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) LIKE 'ORDER MANAGEMENT%' AND INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 NOT LIKE '%XAAS%'))
							AND ((CASE WHEN (SCRCTL.interface_line_attribute2 LIKE '%RMA%' 
							OR SCRCTL.interface_line_attribute2 LIKE '%Replacement%' 
/*Knarlapu:Added Replacement */
							OR SCRCTL.interface_line_attribute2 like '%Try and Buy%')
/*sratadep:Added Try and Buy */
							THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N'  END) = 'Y' ) 
						THEN SCRCTL.interface_line_attribute6
					ELSE COALESCE(ECRCTL.interface_line_attribute6,SCRCTL.interface_line_attribute6) 	
					END
				WHEN  (COALESCE(SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT ,EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT) = 'CBM-OPL-CLOUD') and INSTR(SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2,'-')=0 THEN SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2 /*Added  as part of CBM Mar 2020 Release*/
				WHEN  (COALESCE(SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT ,EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT) = 'ICMS-ADJ' AND EXT.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER = 'CBM-OPL-ICMS' AND INSTR(SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2,'-')=0) THEN SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE2	/*Added  as part of CBM Mar 2020 Release*/
				WHEN UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) IN ('SERVICE RMA','T4C SALES ADJ', 'T4C - SERVICE CM') 
					THEN ECRCTL.interface_line_attribute6
				WHEN (UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) IN ('DISPUTE') OR COALESCE(SCRCTL.interface_line_context,EORCT.interface_header_context) IN ('DISPUTE'))
					THEN SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9  /* Commented attribute9*/
				WHEN ((UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) IN ('ICMS-ADJ') AND INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 NOT IN ('XAAS') ) OR 
				/* COALESCE(SCRCTL.interface_line_context,EORCT.interface_header_context) IN ('ICMS-ADJ'))     --- changes for July 7th ICMS fix */
					(SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT = 'UNK' AND EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT = 'ICMS-ADJ') OR SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT = 'ICMS-ADJ' 
					)
					/* changes for July 7th ICMS fix */
					THEN Coalesce(SCRCTL.interface_line_attribute6,ECRCTL.interface_line_attribute6)  /* Commented attribute9*/   /* changes for July 7th ICMS fix */
			ELSE 0
			END 
		ELSE NULL
	END ORDER_LINE_ID,
 SCRCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID /* CF LSS CR */	
 FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_ST_CG_RA_CUST_TRX_LN SCRCTL 
 INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
  ON ( SCRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME ) 
 INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX EORCT  
  ON ( SCRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = EORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID  
  AND SCRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME = EORCT.GLOBAL_NAME) 
 LEFT JOIN $$GGSRCVWDB.XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN EXT
  ON EXT.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SCRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT 
  ON( SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT= SCRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
   AND SAT.SS_CODE=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT 
  ON(SAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY) 
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
	ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
 INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT   
  ON (      NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
          AND  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
      AND   NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE 
      /* AND   NATT.SS_CODE = NAT.SS_CODE : commented by rchettri : LSS-Q2FY14  */ 
	  ) 
 INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_CG_AR_TRX_LINE_PREV_TRX_ID  WATLPTI 
  ON (SCRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID   = WATLPTI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
  AND SCRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME    = WATLPTI.GLOBAL_NAME) 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES  ECRCTL  
  ON ( ECRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  =  WATLPTI.PREV_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  
  AND ECRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME     =  WATLPTI.GLOBAL_NAME)  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$GGSRCVWDB.XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN LINE_EXTN
  ON (LINE_EXTN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SCRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
   AND SCRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )
   
   LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN ELON ON ELON.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=WATLPTI.PREV_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  
AND  EXT.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' AND SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT LIKE 'T4C%'
   
 WHERE SCRCTL.LINE_TYPE IN ('LINE','FREIGHT')
AND( SCRCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY <> 'Offer Attribution' OR SCRCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY IS NULL)
)SCRCTL_OUT
/* CF LSS CR */
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON(NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = SCRCTL_OUT.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
       AND       SCRCTL_OUT.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
                                                  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B ELMTL    /* added for Q4FY18 CDC */
   ON (  SCRCTL_OUT.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = ELMTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
   and   SCRCTL_OUT.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC')
                
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP2
       ON (NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID = ELMTL.SEGMENT1 
       AND            SCRCTL_OUT.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC') 


LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CHINA_MISC_PROD_LIST ECMPL
ON (COALESCE(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID) =  ECMPL.BK_PRODUCT_ID 
AND ECMPL.ACTIVE_FLAG = 'Y')  /* Q2FY17,CE-CHINA */

SELECT 
 WSCRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME,
 WSCRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
 WSCRCTL.LINE_TYPE ,
 WATLPTI.PREV_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID ,
 ECRCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID,
 ECRCTLOL.DV_ORDER_LINE_ID  /* CF LSS CR */
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_ST_CG_RA_CUST_TRX_LN WSCRCTL
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CG_AR_TRX_LINE_PREV_TRX_ID  WATLPTI 
  ON (WSCRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID   = WATLPTI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
  AND WSCRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME    = WATLPTI.GLOBAL_NAME) 
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN ECRCTLOL
  ON ( ECRCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WSCRCTL.LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID
  AND ECRCTLOL.GLOBAL_NAME = WSCRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME )
 WHERE WSCRCTL.LINE_TYPE = 'TAX'

SELECT
  SCRCTL_OUT.GLOBAL_NAME
 ,SCRCTL_OUT.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
 ,SCRCTL_OUT.LINE_TYPE
 ,SCRCTL_OUT.PREV_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID as PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
 /* Q2FY15 LSS : Nullify FREIGHT Order_Line_ID */
 ,CASE WHEN NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID LIKE 'WEE%FEE%' OR /*NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID = 'FREIGHT' */  ECMPL.BK_PRODUCT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 0 
 WHEN NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID LIKE 'WEE%FEE%' OR /*NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID = 'FREIGHT' */  ECMPL.BK_PRODUCT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 0 
 ELSE SCRCTL_OUT.ORDER_LINE_ID END as ORDER_LINE_ID /* Q2FY17 CE-CHINA - Commenting 'FREIGHT' condition and adding BK_PRODUCT_ID from ETLONLYDB.EL_CHINA_MISC_PROD_LIST  */
 ,SCRCTL_OUT.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 ,SCRCTL_OUT.ATTRIBUTE8
 --,SCRCTL_OUT.ORDER_LINE_ID as DV_ORDER_LINE_ID /* CF LSS CR */
 /* added below logic as per SME confirmation*/
 ,CASE 
 WHEN NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID LIKE 'WEE%FEE%' OR   ECMPL.BK_PRODUCT_ID IS NOT NULL 
 THEN 0 
 WHEN NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID LIKE 'WEE%FEE%' OR   ECMPL.BK_PRODUCT_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 0
 ELSE 
 SCRCTL_OUT.ORDER_LINE_ID 
 END as DV_ORDER_LINE_ID  
 ,SCRCTL_OUT.ATTRIBUTE11
 FROM
 (
  SELECT  /*INV : Batch source (ICMS-ADJ, ORDER MANAGEMENT)*/
    SCRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME,
    SCRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
    SCRCTL.LINE_TYPE ,
    WATLPTI.PREV_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID      ,
   CASE 
   WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN
      CASE 
	  WHEN ELON.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN ELON.ORDER_LINE_ID
	  WHEN COALESCE(LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER,'UNKNOWN') LIKE 'OM-FBINV%'
      OR SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT LIKE 'OM-FBINV%'
	  THEN --TRIM(SUBSTR(SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 ,1,  POSITION('-' IN SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4)-1))	
	  CASE WHEN Position('-' IN SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4)>0 THEN 
			Trim(Substr(SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 ,1,  Position('-' IN SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4)-1))	
			ELSE SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 END 
	  WHEN ( (COALESCE(SCRCTL.interface_line_context,EORCT.interface_header_context) In ('ICMS-ADJ') AND SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 NOT IN ('XAAS'))
          OR (UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) LIKE 'ORDER MANAGEMENT%' AND SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 NOT IN ('XAAS'))
		  OR (UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) IN ('ICMS-ADJ') AND SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 NOT IN ('XAAS'))) 
         THEN
        CASE WHEN  (UPPER(SCRCTL.ATTRIBUTE9) like '%TOP SKU%' ) 
         THEN SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6   
         WHEN  (SCRCTL.ATTRIBUTE9  IS NOT NULL  ) 
       THEN SCRCTL.ATTRIBUTE9
        ELSE  NULL 
        END    
        ELSE NULL
      END
      /*CM: Batch source (ICMS-ADJ, SERVICE RMA, T4C SALES ADJ)*/
      WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE  In ('CM') THEN
         CASE 
		 WHEN ELON.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN ELON.ORDER_LINE_ID      
		 WHEN COALESCE(LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER,'UNKNOWN') LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' 
		 OR SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT LIKE 'OM-FBINV%'
		 THEN --TRIM(SUBSTR(SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 ,1,  POSITION('-' IN SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4)-1))	
		 CASE WHEN Position('-' IN SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4)>0 THEN 
			Trim(Substr(SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 ,1,  Position('-' IN SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4)-1))	
			ELSE SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 END 
		 WHEN ( (SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT = 'UNK' AND EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT = 'ICMS-ADJ')
		 OR (SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT = 'ICMS-ADJ'  AND SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 NOT IN ('XAAS'))/*  changes for July 7th ICMS fix */
           OR (UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) = 'ICMS-ADJ' AND SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 NOT IN ('XAAS') )
			OR (UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) LIKE 'ORDER MANAGEMENT%' AND SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 NOT IN ('XAAS'))) /*OA Q3FY15*/
          THEN
                CASE WHEN  (UPPER(SCRCTL.ATTRIBUTE9) like '%TOP SKU%'  ) 
          THEN Coalesce(SCRCTL.interface_line_attribute6,ECRCTL.interface_line_attribute6)   /*  chnages for July 7th ICMS fix */
        WHEN  (SCRCTL.ATTRIBUTE9  IS NOT NULL ) 
         THEN SCRCTL.ATTRIBUTE9
        ELSE  NULL 
        END  
        WHEN UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) IN ('SERVICE RMA','T4C SALES ADJ')
         THEN 
              CASE WHEN  (UPPER(SCRCTL.ATTRIBUTE9) like '%TOP SKU%'  ) 
         THEN ECRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6   
         WHEN  (SCRCTL.ATTRIBUTE9  IS NOT NULL ) 
         THEN SCRCTL.ATTRIBUTE9
        ELSE  NULL 
        END  
          
      ELSE NULL
      END     
      /*DM: Batch source (ICMS-ADJ)*/
       WHEN NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE  In ('DM') THEN
	   CASE 
	   WHEN ELON.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN ELON.ORDER_LINE_ID      
	   WHEN COALESCE(LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER,'UNKNOWN') LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' 
	   OR SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT LIKE 'OM-FBINV%'
	   THEN --TRIM(SUBSTR(SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 ,1,  POSITION('-' IN SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4)-1))	
	   CASE WHEN Position('-' IN SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4)>0 THEN 
			Trim(Substr(SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 ,1,  Position('-' IN SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4)-1))	
			ELSE SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 END 
			
			/*CASE WHEN ( COALESCE(SCRCTL.interface_line_context,EORCT.interface_header_context) In ('ICMS-ADJ') */
	    WHEN ( (SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT = 'UNK' AND EORCT.INTERFACE_HEADER_CONTEXT = 'ICMS-ADJ') 
	   OR (SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT = 'ICMS-ADJ' AND SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 NOT IN ('XAAS'))	   /* ---- chnages for July 7th ICMS fix */
           OR (UPPER(NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME) IN ('ICMS-ADJ') AND SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 NOT IN ('XAAS')))
          THEN
                CASE WHEN  (UPPER(SCRCTL.ATTRIBUTE9) like '%TOP SKU%' ) 
          THEN Coalesce(SCRCTL.interface_line_attribute6,ECRCTL.interface_line_attribute6) /*----- chnages for July 7th ICMS fix */ 
         WHEN  (SCRCTL.ATTRIBUTE9  IS NOT NULL ) 
         THEN SCRCTL.ATTRIBUTE9
        ELSE  NULL 
        END  
      ELSE NULL
      END   
     ELSE NULL
    END ORDER_LINE_ID,
    CASE WHEN SCRCTL.ATTRIBUTE9 ='Top SKU' THEN NULL
     ELSE SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6 END AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
     SCRCTL.ATTRIBUTE8,
     SCRCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, /* CF LSS CR */ 
 CASE WHEN SCRCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY = 'Offer Attribution' AND SCRCTL.ATTRIBUTE9 NOT LIKE '%Top SKU%' THEN SCRCTL.ATTRIBUTE11  
    ELSE NULL END as ATTRIBUTE11 /* OA Q3FY15 */
    FROM
     $$STGDB.WI_ST_CG_RA_CUST_TRX_LN SCRCTL 
    INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
     ON ( SCRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME ) 
    INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUSTOMER_TRX EORCT  
     ON ( SCRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = EORCT.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID  
     AND SCRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME = EORCT.GLOBAL_NAME) 
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT 
     ON( SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT= SCRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
      AND SAT.SS_CODE=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE) 
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT 
     ON(SAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY) 
    INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
    ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
    INNER JOIN   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT   
     ON (      NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
             AND  NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
         AND   NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE 
         /* AND   NATT.SS_CODE = NAT.SS_CODE : commented by rchettri : LSS-Q2FY14  */ 
      ) 
    INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_CG_AR_TRX_LINE_PREV_TRX_ID  WATLPTI 
     ON (SCRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID   = WATLPTI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
     AND SCRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME    = WATLPTI.GLOBAL_NAME) 
    LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES  ECRCTL  
     ON ( ECRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  =  WATLPTI.PREV_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  
     AND ECRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME     =  WATLPTI.GLOBAL_NAME)  
	LEFT OUTER JOIN $$GGSRCVWDB.XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN LINE_EXTN
   ON (LINE_EXTN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SCRCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID	
      AND SCRCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' ) 	  
	LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN ELON ON ELON.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID=WATLPTI.PREV_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID  
    AND  LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' AND SCRCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT LIKE 'T4C%'

    WHERE SCRCTL.LINE_TYPE='LINE'
       AND SCRCTL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY =  'Offer Attribution'
 )SCRCTL_OUT
 /* CF LSS CR */
 LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
 ON(NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT = SCRCTL_OUT.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
        AND       SCRCTL_OUT.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
                                                  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B ELMTL    /* added for Q4FY18 CDC */
   ON (  SCRCTL_OUT.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = ELMTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
   and   SCRCTL_OUT.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC')
                
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP2
       ON (NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID = ELMTL.SEGMENT1 
       AND            SCRCTL_OUT.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC') 
 
 LEFT JOIN $$ETLONLYDB.EL_CHINA_MISC_PROD_LIST ECMPL
ON (COALESCE(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID)=  ECMPL.BK_PRODUCT_ID 
AND ECMPL.ACTIVE_FLAG = 'Y')  /* Q2FY17,CE-CHINA */
